item.name: SDS Fenrir Key
item.description: A thin key that brings the beastly vehicle Fenrir roaring to life.

mount.name: SDS Fenrir
mount.action: Call into battle the SDS Fenrir, a lore-bending battlebike that looks as if it was driven straight from an age unknown.
mount.description: Manufactured for use by the now-defunct Strife Delivery Service, this two-wheeled monstrosity's ceruleum engine howls like the silver wolf of legend as it propels its rider across desert and plain.
mount.tooltip:
Misfortune is no excuse
for failing a delivery!
- Hildeyerd
